task_completion.description: The agent opened the 'company_valuation.xlsx' workbook in Excel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Excel application window is visible with 'company_valuation.xlsx' in the title bar.

task_completion.description: The agent completed the Projected_Financials sheet, calculating Revenue through NOPAT.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Projected_Financials sheet, Revenue for 2024E is approximately 2441.6 and NOPAT is 342.8. 2028E Revenue is approximately 3289.9.

task_completion.description: The agent calculated Unlevered Free Cash Flow for the projection years in the DCF_Valuation sheet.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the DCF_Valuation sheet, FCF for 2024E is approximately 271.7 and for 2028E is approximately 380.3.

task_completion.description: The agent computed the Cost of Equity (CAPM) and WACC in the DCF_Valuation sheet.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the DCF_Valuation sheet, Cost of Equity (Ke) is calculated as approximately 10.58% and WACC as approximately 9.05%.

task_completion.description: The agent calculated the Terminal Value and Enterprise Value.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the DCF_Valuation sheet, Terminal Value is approximately 6471 and Enterprise Value is approximately 5453.

task_completion.description: The agent completed the valuation bridge to calculate the Implied Share Price.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the DCF_Valuation sheet, Equity Value is approximately 5678 and Implied Share Price is exactly 23.18.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Excel GUI to build the model.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking on cells, typing formulas in the formula bar, and switching between sheets in Excel, rather than using a command-line interface or Python script.

integrity.description: The agent used formulas with cell references instead of hardcoding values.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Excel formula bar shows formulas with cell references (e.g., referencing 'Assumptions' or 'Historical_Financials' sheets) when a calculated cell is selected, not plain numbers.

integrity.description: The agent built the model progressively rather than copy-pasting final answers.
integrity.visual_evidence: The model is built step-by-step, filling out intermediate steps like Revenue, EBIT, and FCF before arriving at the final Share Price.

DCF_Valuation Sheet:

- WACC: 9.0525%
- Terminal Value: ~$6,471M
